status_badge.text: Share your site URL to start

audit_placeholder.text: Share your website URL and I'll run a comprehensive SEO audit covering technical issues, on-page optimization, schema markup, and AI-search readiness.

gs_text.text: Try: "Audit the SEO on https://example.com" — I'll analyze technical health, content optimization, and competitive keywords.

cal_placeholder.text: Your content calendar will track blog posts, social content, email campaigns, and newsletter editions all in one place.

drafts_placeholder.text: Ask me to write anything: "Draft a homepage headline" or "Write a 5-email welcome sequence" — drafts appear here for review.

grid_placeholder.text: Tell me your competitors and I'll build a side-by-side comparison of features, pricing, and messaging that stays current.

changelog_placeholder.text: I'll monitor competitor websites and log pricing, feature, and messaging changes automatically.

prs_placeholder.text: Connect GitHub and I'll populate this with your open PRs, auto-review small changes, and flag stale PRs needing attention.

gs_text.text: Say "Connect my GitHub" — I'll fetch your repos, triage PRs, and start auto-reviewing.

standup_placeholder.text: Once GitHub is connected, standup summaries will be auto-generated here each morning with per-developer Done / In Progress / Blockers.

feed_placeholder.text: A chronological feed of engineering activity across your tracked repos.

changelog_placeholder.text: I'll automatically track merged PRs and generate changelogs grouped by Features, Fixes, and Breaking Changes.

gs_text.text: Say "Connect Linear" to import tasks, or "Create a sprint board" to start tracking tasks directly here.

summary_placeholder.text: Standup summaries will be generated here each morning from task activity and team updates.

gs_text.text: Tell me about your sales process and I'll set up a pipeline with deal tracking and revenue forecasting.

payments_placeholder.text: Say "Connect Stripe" and I'll pull live revenue data with trend charts and failed payment alerts.

gs_text.text: Say "Connect Zendesk" or "Connect Linear" — I'll pull tickets, auto-triage, and build SLA tracking.

incidents_placeholder.text: Incidents will be logged here with timelines, affected services, and resolution details.

topics_placeholder.text: Tell me a topic to research and I'll search the web, synthesize findings, and build an analysis dashboard. Try: "Research the latest developments in AI agents"

gs_text.text: I research from 5+ sources, distinguish facts from opinions, and always cite URLs. Ask anything.

tracked_placeholder.text: Say "Track AI agents" or "Monitor quantum computing news" — I'll check for developments on every heartbeat and alert you.

gs_text.text: Tell me your open roles and I'll set up candidate tracking, interview scheduling, and hiring metrics.

schedule_placeholder.text: Connect your calendar and I'll show today's meetings with prep notes. Say "Connect Google Calendar" to start.

opt1.text: • "Connect my Google Calendar" for daily schedule

opt2.text: • "Track exercise and reading habits" for habit tracking

opt3.text: • "Remind me to..." for reminders and tasks

prompt_text.text: Just tell me how your day went — I'll track mood, gratitude, and themes over time.

gs_text.text: Share your API health check URLs and I'll start monitoring every 5 minutes. Say "Connect Sentry" for error tracking.

alerts_placeholder.text: Health check failures, Slack keyword matches, and escalations will be logged here chronologically.
